sourcesContent:
export const CONDITIONS = [
  {
    id: "c1",
    label: "Component Offline",
    desc: "Triggers when sensor/actuator disconnects",
    color: "#fee2e2",
    border: "#fca5a5",
    text: "#dc2626",
  },
  {
    id: "c2",
    label: "High Temperature",
    desc: "Triggers on thermal threshold",
    color: "#ffedd5",
    border: "#fdba74",
    text: "#ea580c",
  },
  {
    id: "c3",
    label: "Sensor Threshold",
    desc: "Triggers on sensor value limit",
    color: "#fef9c3",
    border: "#fde047",
    text: "#ca8a04",
  },
];

export const ACTIONS = [
  {
    id: "a1",
    label: "Reset Component",
    desc: "Restart sensor or actuator",
    color: "#dbeafe",
    border: "#93c5fd",
    text: "#1d4ed8",
    icon: "↺",
  },
  {
    id: "a2",
    label: "Recalibrate",
    desc: "Run calibration sequence",
    color: "#f3e8ff",
    border: "#c4b5fd",
    text: "#7c3aed",
    icon: "⚡",
  },
  {
    id: "a3",
    label: "Send Alert",
    desc: "Notify field operators",
    color: "#dcfce7",
    border: "#86efac",
    text: "#15803d",
    icon: "🔔",
  },
  {
    id: "a4",
    label: "Activate Fallback",
    desc: "Switch to backup control mode",
    color: "#ccfbf1",
    border: "#5eead4",
    text: "#0f766e",
    icon: "🛡️",
  },
  {
    id: "a5",
    label: "Log Incident",
    desc: "Record failure for analysis",
    color: "#e0f2fe",
    border: "#7dd3fc",
    text: "#0369a1",
    icon: "📝",
  },
];
